/FTRRECORDED/CAL:JURY TRIAL/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO CHECK IN WITH ACM 5 TIMES A WEEK IN PERSON FOR SUPERVISION AND PARTICIPATE IN OUTPATIENT TREATMENT AT HYDE STREET COMMUNITY SERVICE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITYPROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIORTO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:COURT WILL REMOVE IN 2 MONTHS WITH NO VIOLATIONS/LDTR:06-06-22/CONT/DOP/VD:HEARING ON 05-31-22/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:BAIL REVIEW HEARING/MO GRTD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THEDEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO MANAGER 2 TIMES A WEEK IN PERSON, STAY OUT OFWESTFIELD MALL, AND COMPLY WITHELECTRONIC MONITORING/VD:PTC & RECEIPT OF ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 03-11-22/X:JURY TRIAL ON 03-22-22 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/X:TO SHOW GOOD FAITH & CONFIRM GPS/LDTR:04-04-22/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:1500 BW RETURN FROM 02-15-22/BWDNC/X:991 MOTION IS DENIED/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:04-04-22/X:RELEASE OUT OF CUSTODY IS DENIED/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/SA4:WESTFIELD MALL AT 865 MARKET ST, SF/SAORD/CONTD:BAIL REVIEW HEARING ON 03-08-22, PTC AND RECEIPT OF ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 03-11-22, AND JURY TRIAL/DOP/
